name: Phoenitron Holdings Limited
summary: Phoenitron Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the contract manufacturing and sale of smart cards. The company operates through five segments: Sales of Smart Cards; Sales of Smart Card Application Systems; Financial and Management Consultancy Services; Sales and Trading of Scrap Metals; and Media and Entertainment. It also trades in scrap vehicles; and develops and provides smart card application systems. In addition, the company provides financial and management consultancy services; and research, development, marketing, and sales services. Further, it is involved in the production of a TV play. It operates in the People's Republic of China, Hong Kong, Taiwan, Europe, Africa, and rest of Asia. The company was formerly known as Cardlink Technology Group Limited and changed its name to Phoenitron Holdings Limited May 2010. Phoenitron Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2001 and is headquartered in Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong.
